description: Elena attempts to stop the mechs using her Inhuman speed, but her prosthetic arms overload and she is injured. Fitz and Simmons barricade themselves in the lab to fight off the mechs while Elena escapes, showing the cost of their desperate situation.
location: Hydra facility (abandoned English nuclear silo / Particle Infusion Chamber site)

transcript.line: You guys open one of the doors, whoosh, whoosh, I take their guns, we shoot the robots, we go home.
Sounds brilliant to me.
Mack is going to be sad to miss this.
Yo-Yo. Yo-Yo, what's going on?
Aah!
Is that furrowed brow about our patient or about Yo-Yo?
One minute, I'm terrified for her, and the next minute, I'm furious with her. Elena's always been stubborn, but ever since her arms...
Yeah, well, if I hadn't let Hale...
No, don't do that. You made a mistake.
Yeah, a big mistake. Like, how do you even begin to make up for something like that?
Well, you fix something else. That's why I like engines, putting the pieces together...
No, no, no, no, no, no.
Piper, what do we do?
Uh, we have to find the source of the bleeding.
All right, the bullet's in there. Must've nicked an artery. All right, step two.
You have to clamp the artery before his blood pressure drops any more.
Did not think I'd be doing this today. Damn it, stay still.
We're trying to help you.
He's stabilised.
That's step two?
Yeah. Well, we're gonna have to wait to high-five. Step three is, you sew his artery shut so he doesn't bleed out and die.
We need a new plan.
What happened out there?
Aah! I don't know. I was using my speed, and it felt like my arms were being ripped off.
The mech arms aren't built to go that fast.
The interface is transmitting every electrical signal simultaneously. It's overloading your nervous system.
I don't need an explanation! I need a solution!
I can't recalibrate them, not here, not before that door gives in.
Take cover there. Fitz and I will draw them away from the exits, keep them occupied. You find a way out, make it to the Quinjet, call for backup.
I can fight. I think one of you should...
No. We have a rule.
We never leave each other's side anymore.
I'm sorry you never got the honeymoon you dreamed of.
Nonsense. I'm protecting England from evil robots with the man I love.
Ah, it's jammed!
Go back, go back! Running low.
I don't know what we were thinking.
